title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at JLL India

jsonLd.title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at JLL India
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Real Estate Agent looking for your next big career move? JLL India in Kochi offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About JLL India:
JLL India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with JLL India!
